//: Claude Code telemetry env block. Merge into ~/.claude/settings.json to make
//endpoint: a Claude Code client export OTLP to the collector. localhost is for a
//remote: client ON the VM; a remote client points OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT at
//remote2: http://<VM_PUBLIC_IP>:4317 (and its IP must be on the SG allowlist).
//auth: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS carries the shared ingest token — the collector
//auth2: rejects pushes without it. Use bootstrap-claude-telemetry.sh to fill it in.
